changelog: Fixed: CapacitorUpdater version/exec guard — no more runtime crash on device
Fixed: Removed OTA polling loop; plugin runs once per app foreground
Fixed: downloadProgressModal no longer stuck at 100%
Fixed: Chart timestamp sort — metrics ordered oldest-to-newest reliably
Added: Chart period filter UI (day / week / month / 3 months)
Refactored: Dashboard widget cleanup and layout stabilisation
Fix: notifyAppReady fires once via useEffect dependency reset
Fix: version.json treated as single source of truth in OTA hook
